title: abutilon inaequilaterum
intro: Abutilon inaequilaterum, also known as the Indian mallow or Indian velvet leaf, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae) native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Abutilon inaequilaterum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Abutilon inaequilaterum include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
